name: naver-ai-blogger
description: Codex plugin and CLI for publishing restaurant posts to Naver Blog.
author: Vicky

scripts.check: node --check bin/naver-ai-blogger.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/naver/auth.js && node --check src/naver/client.js && node --check src/naver/editor.js && node --check src/naver/images.js && node --check src/naver/session.js && node --check src/naver/utils.js
